# paren-fuzz seed cases — known-mismatch regressions pinned for replay.
# Lines beginning with `#` and blank lines are ignored. Each SQL is
# replayed as an additional probe after the PRNG-generated batch.
#
# Status: empty.
#
# PAREN-KB-1 (inner JOIN missing ON/USING inside parens) was closed by
# the parseJoinQual strictness fix; the canonical `FROM (T JOIN U)` /
# `FROM (foo LEFT JOIN W)` / `FROM (foo RIGHT OUTER JOIN W)` probes now
# produce PG-omni parity. The hand-written §2.7 test
# "inner JOIN missing qual" is unskipped. Seed probes removed — nothing
# to pin.
#
# PAREN-KB-2 (trailing SELECT after paren-wrapped subquery): never
# belonged here — that's a statement-list bug (parser.go Parse-level),
# not a `(` dispatch bug. Tracked in PAREN_KNOWN_BUGS.md with its own
# recommended fix site.
